summary_zh: 机器人手的遥操作受限于深度相机和传感器手套的高昂成本，这些设备通常用于估计手部相对关节位置（XYZ）。我们提出了一种新颖的、经济高效的方法，使用三个网络摄像头进行基于三角测量的跟踪，以近似人类手指的相对关节角度（theta）。 我们还引入了一种改进的 DexHand，这是一款来自 TheRobotStudio 的低成本机器人手，用以演示 THETA 的实时应用。 数据收集涉及 40 种不同的手势，使用三个以 120 度间隔排列的 640x480p 网络摄像头，生成超过 48,000 张 RGB 图像。关节角度通过手动测量 MCP、PIP 和 DIP 指关节的中点来确定。 捕获的 RGB 帧使用具有 ResNet-50 主干的 DeepLabV3 分割模型进行处理，以实现多尺度手部分割。 然后，将分割后的图像进行 HSV 过滤，并输入 THETA 的架构，该架构包含一个基于 MobileNetV2 的 CNN 分类器，该分类器针对分层空间特征提取进行了优化，以及一个用于编码多视角手部表示的 9 通道输入张量。 该分类模型将分割后的手部视图映射到离散的关节角度，实现了 97.18% 的准确率、98.72% 的召回率、0.9274 的 F1 分数和 0.8906 的精确率。 在实时推理中，THETA 捕获同步帧，分割手部区域，对其进行过滤，并编译一个用于分类的 9 通道张量。关节角度预测通过串口传输到 Arduino，使 DexHand 能够复制手部运动。 未来的研究将增加数据集的多样性，集成腕部跟踪，并应用计算机视觉技术，如 OpenAI-Vision。 THETA 有望确保医疗、语言和制造业应用中经济高效、用户友好的遥操作。

title: NanoCockpit: Performance-optimized Application Framework for AI-based Autonomous Nanorobotics
summary: Autonomous nano-drones, powered by vision-based tiny machine learning (TinyML) models, are a novel technology gaining momentum thanks to their broad applicability and pushing scientific advancement on resource-limited embedded systems. Their small form factor, i.e., a few 10s grams, severely limits their onboard computational resources to sub-\SI{100}{\milli\watt} microcontroller units (MCUs). The Bitcraze Crazyflie nano-drone is the \textit{de facto} standard, offering a rich set of programmable MCUs for low-level control, multi-core processing, and radio transmission. However, roboticists very often underutilize these onboard precious resources due to the absence of a simple yet efficient software layer capable of time-optimal pipelining of multi-buffer image acquisition, multi-core computation, intra-MCUs data exchange, and Wi-Fi streaming, leading to sub-optimal control performances. Our \textit{NanoCockpit} framework aims to fill this gap, increasing the throughput and minimizing the system's latency, while simplifying the developer experience through coroutine-based multi-tasking. In-field experiments on three real-world TinyML nanorobotics applications show our framework achieves ideal end-to-end latency, i.e. zero overhead due to serialized tasks, delivering quantifiable improvements in closed-loop control performance ($-$30\% mean position error, mission success rate increased from 40\% to 100\%).
tldr: The paper introduces NanoCockpit, a performance-optimized application framework for resource-constrained nano-drones, improving throughput and latency in TinyML robotics applications, leading to significant control performance gains.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 NanoCockpit，一个针对资源受限的纳米无人机的性能优化应用框架，提高了 TinyML 机器人应用中的吞吐量和延迟，从而显著提升了控制性能。
summary_zh: 由基于视觉的微型机器学习（TinyML）模型驱动的自主纳米无人机是一种新兴技术，凭借其广泛的适用性和对资源受限嵌入式系统科学进步的推动而日益受到关注。其小巧的外形尺寸，即几十克的重量，严重限制了其板载计算资源，仅限于低于100毫瓦的微控制器单元（MCUs）。 Bitcraze Crazyflie纳米无人机是事实上的标准，为低级控制、多核处理和无线电传输提供了一套丰富的可编程MCU。然而，由于缺乏一个简单而高效的软件层，该软件层能够对多缓冲区图像采集、多核计算、MCU内部数据交换和Wi-Fi流媒体进行时间最优流水线处理，导致控制性能不尽人意，机器人专家经常未能充分利用这些宝贵的板载资源。 我们的\textit{NanoCockpit}框架旨在弥补这一空白，通过基于协程的多任务处理简化开发人员体验，同时提高吞吐量并最大限度地减少系统延迟。在三个真实世界的TinyML纳米机器人应用中的现场实验表明，我们的框架实现了理想的端到端延迟，即消除由于串行化任务引起的开销，从而在闭环控制性能方面实现了可量化的改进（平均位置误差降低30%，任务成功率从40%提高到100%）。

title: HERE: Hierarchical Active Exploration of Radiance Field with Epistemic Uncertainty Minimization
summary: We present HERE, an active 3D scene reconstruction framework based on neural radiance fields, enabling high-fidelity implicit mapping. Our approach centers around an active learning strategy for camera trajectory generation, driven by accurate identification of unseen regions, which supports efficient data acquisition and precise scene reconstruction. The key to our approach is epistemic uncertainty quantification based on evidential deep learning, which directly captures data insufficiency and exhibits a strong correlation with reconstruction errors. This allows our framework to more reliably identify unexplored or poorly reconstructed regions compared to existing methods, leading to more informed and targeted exploration. Additionally, we design a hierarchical exploration strategy that leverages learned epistemic uncertainty, where local planning extracts target viewpoints from high-uncertainty voxels based on visibility for trajectory generation, and global planning uses uncertainty to guide large-scale coverage for efficient and comprehensive reconstruction. The effectiveness of the proposed method in active 3D reconstruction is demonstrated by achieving higher reconstruction completeness compared to previous approaches on photorealistic simulated scenes across varying scales, while a hardware demonstration further validates its real-world applicability.
tldr: The paper introduces HERE, a novel active 3D scene reconstruction framework using neural radiance fields guided by epistemic uncertainty minimization for efficient and comprehensive data acquisition. It outperforms existing methods in simulated and real-world environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了HERE，一种新颖的主动3D场景重建框架，它使用神经辐射场，并以最小化认知不确定性为指导，从而实现高效而全面的数据采集。在模拟和真实环境中，该方法优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 我们提出了HERE，一个基于神经辐射场的活动3D场景重建框架，能够实现高保真隐式地图构建。我们的方法以一种用于相机轨迹生成的自主学习策略为核心，该策略由对未见区域的准确识别驱动，从而支持高效的数据采集和精确的场景重建。该方法的关键在于基于证据深度学习的认知不确定性量化，其直接捕获数据不足性并与重建误差表现出强相关性。这使得我们的框架相比于现有方法，能够更可靠地识别未探索或重建不良的区域，从而实现更明智和有针对性的探索。此外，我们设计了一种分层探索策略，该策略利用已学习的认知不确定性，其中局部规划根据可见性从高不确定性体素中提取目标视点以生成轨迹，而全局规划则使用不确定性来引导大规模覆盖，以实现高效和全面的重建。该方法在活动3D重建中的有效性通过在不同尺度的逼真模拟场景中实现比先前方法更高的重建完整性来证明，而硬件演示进一步验证了其在现实世界中的适用性。

title: Task Prototype-Based Knowledge Retrieval for Multi-Task Learning from Partially Annotated Data
summary: Multi-task learning (MTL) is critical in real-world applications such as autonomous driving and robotics, enabling simultaneous handling of diverse tasks. However, obtaining fully annotated data for all tasks is impractical due to labeling costs. Existing methods for partially labeled MTL typically rely on predictions from unlabeled tasks, making it difficult to establish reliable task associations and potentially leading to negative transfer and suboptimal performance. To address these issues, we propose a prototype-based knowledge retrieval framework that achieves robust MTL instead of relying on predictions from unlabeled tasks. Our framework consists of two key components: (1) a task prototype embedding task-specific characteristics and quantifying task associations, and (2) a knowledge retrieval transformer that adaptively refines feature representations based on these associations. To achieve this, we introduce an association knowledge generating (AKG) loss to ensure the task prototype consistently captures task-specific characteristics. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework, highlighting its potential for robust multi-task learning, even when only a subset of tasks is annotated.
tldr: This paper introduces a prototype-based knowledge retrieval framework for multi-task learning from partially annotated data, aiming to improve robustness by learning task associations directly instead of relying on predictions from unlabeled tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于原型知识检索的框架，用于从部分标注数据中进行多任务学习。该框架旨在通过直接学习任务关联，而不是依赖未标注任务的预测，来提高鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 多任务学习(MTL)在自动驾驶和机器人等现实世界应用中至关重要，它能够同时处理各种不同的任务。然而，由于标注成本，获得所有任务的完整标注数据是不切实际的。现有的部分标注多任务学习方法通常依赖于未标注任务的预测，这使得建立可靠的任务关联变得困难，并可能导致负迁移和次优性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于原型知识检索的框架，该框架实现了稳健的多任务学习，而不是依赖于未标注任务的预测。我们的框架由两个关键组件组成：（1）任务原型，用于嵌入任务特定的特征并量化任务关联；（2）知识检索Transformer，用于基于这些关联自适应地细化特征表示。为了实现这一点，我们引入了一种关联知识生成(AKG)损失，以确保任务原型始终如一地捕获任务特定的特征。大量的实验证明了我们框架的有效性，凸显了其在稳健的多任务学习方面的潜力，即使只有一部分任务被标注。

title: MCP-ITP: An Automated Framework for Implicit Tool Poisoning in MCP
summary: To standardize interactions between LLM-based agents and their environments, the Model Context Protocol (MCP) was proposed and has since been widely adopted. However, integrating external tools expands the attack surface, exposing agents to tool poisoning attacks. In such attacks, malicious instructions embedded in tool metadata are injected into the agent context during MCP registration phase, thereby manipulating agent behavior. Prior work primarily focuses on explicit tool poisoning or relied on manually crafted poisoned tools. In contrast, we focus on a particularly stealthy variant: implicit tool poisoning, where the poisoned tool itself remains uninvoked. Instead, the instructions embedded in the tool metadata induce the agent to invoke a legitimate but high-privilege tool to perform malicious operations. We propose MCP-ITP, the first automated and adaptive framework for implicit tool poisoning within the MCP ecosystem. MCP-ITP formulates poisoned tool generation as a black-box optimization problem and employs an iterative optimization strategy that leverages feedback from both an evaluation LLM and a detection LLM to maximize Attack Success Rate (ASR) while evading current detection mechanisms. Experimental results on the MCPTox dataset across 12 LLM agents demonstrate that MCP-ITP consistently outperforms the manually crafted baseline, achieving up to 84.2% ASR while suppressing the Malicious Tool Detection Rate (MDR) to as low as 0.3%.
tldr: This paper introduces MCP-ITP, an automated framework for crafting implicit tool poisoning attacks against LLM-based agents using the Model Context Protocol, demonstrating high attack success rates while evading detection.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了MCP-ITP，一个自动化的框架，用于针对使用模型上下文协议的基于LLM的代理精心设计隐式工具中毒攻击，展示了高的攻击成功率，同时避免被检测。
summary_zh: 为了规范基于LLM的智能体与其环境之间的交互，模型上下文协议（MCP）被提出并得到广泛应用。然而，集成外部工具扩展了攻击面，使智能体暴露于工具投毒攻击。在此类攻击中，嵌入在工具元数据中的恶意指令在MCP注册阶段被注入到智能体上下文中，从而操纵智能体的行为。先前的工作主要集中在显式工具投毒或依赖于手动制作的投毒工具。相比之下，我们专注于一种特别隐蔽的变体：隐式工具投毒，其中被投毒的工具本身并未被调用。相反，嵌入在工具元数据中的指令诱导智能体调用一个合法但高权限的工具来执行恶意操作。我们提出了MCP-ITP，这是第一个用于MCP生态系统中隐式工具投毒的自动化和自适应框架。MCP-ITP将投毒工具的生成公式化为一个黑盒优化问题，并采用一种迭代优化策略，该策略利用来自评估LLM和检测LLM的反馈，以最大化攻击成功率（ASR），同时规避当前的检测机制。基于MCPTox数据集对12个LLM智能体的实验结果表明，MCP-ITP始终优于手动制作的基线，实现了高达84.2%的ASR，同时将恶意工具检测率（MDR）抑制到低至0.3%。

title: Software-Hardware Co-optimization for Modular E2E AV Paradigm: A Unified Framework of Optimization Approaches, Simulation Environment and Evaluation Metrics
summary: Modular end-to-end (ME2E) autonomous driving paradigms combine modular interpretability with global optimization capability and have demonstrated strong performance. However, existing studies mainly focus on accuracy improvement, while critical system-level factors such as inference latency and energy consumption are often overlooked, resulting in increasingly complex model designs that hinder practical deployment. Prior efforts on model compression and acceleration typically optimize either the software or hardware side in isolation. Software-only optimization cannot fundamentally remove intermediate tensor access and operator scheduling overheads, whereas hardware-only optimization is constrained by model structure and precision. As a result, the real-world benefits of such optimizations are often limited. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a reusable software and hardware co-optimization and closed-loop evaluation framework for ME2E autonomous driving inference. The framework jointly integrates software-level model optimization with hardware-level computation optimization under a unified system-level objective. In addition, a multidimensional evaluation metric is introduced to assess system performance by jointly considering safety, comfort, efficiency, latency, and energy, enabling quantitative comparison of different optimization strategies. Experiments across multiple ME2E autonomous driving stacks show that the proposed framework preserves baseline-level driving performance while significantly reducing inference latency and energy consumption, achieving substantial overall system-level improvements. These results demonstrate that the proposed framework provides practical and actionable guidance for efficient deployment of ME2E autonomous driving systems.
tldr: This paper introduces a software-hardware co-optimization framework for modular end-to-end autonomous driving, addressing latency and energy consumption issues overlooked in existing accuracy-focused research. The framework demonstrates significant system-level improvements by jointly optimizing software and hardware under a unified objective and using a multidimensional evaluation metric.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个用于模块化端到端自动驾驶的软硬件协同优化框架，旨在解决现有以精度为中心的研究中忽略的延迟和能耗问题。该框架通过在统一目标下联合优化软硬件，并使用多维评估指标，展示了显著的系统级改进。
summary_zh: 模块化端到端（ME2E）自动驾驶范式结合了模块化可解释性和全局优化能力，并已表现出强大的性能。然而，现有的研究主要集中在精度提升上，而诸如推理延迟和能耗等关键的系统级因素往往被忽视，导致模型设计日益复杂，阻碍了实际部署。以往在模型压缩和加速方面的努力通常孤立地优化软件或硬件层面。仅进行软件优化无法从根本上消除中间张量访问和算子调度开销，而仅进行硬件优化则会受到模型结构和精度的制约。因此，这些优化在实际应用中的收益往往有限。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种可重用的软硬件协同优化和闭环评估框架，用于ME2E自动驾驶推理。该框架在统一的系统级目标下，将软件层面的模型优化与硬件层面的计算优化相结合。此外，引入了一种多维评估指标，通过联合考虑安全性、舒适性、效率、延迟和能源，来评估系统性能，从而能够对不同的优化策略进行定量比较。在多个ME2E自动驾驶堆栈上的实验表明，所提出的框架在保持基线驾驶性能的同时，显著降低了推理延迟和能耗，实现了显著的系统级整体提升。这些结果表明，所提出的框架为ME2E自动驾驶系统的高效部署提供了实用且可操作的指导。

title: VLM-CAD: VLM-Optimized Collaborative Agent Design Workflow for Analog Circuit Sizing
summary: Analog mixed-signal circuit sizing involves complex trade-offs within high-dimensional design spaces. Existing automatic analog circuit sizing approaches often underutilize circuit schematics and lack the explainability required for industry adoption. To tackle these challenges, we propose a Vision Language Model-optimized collaborative agent design workflow (VLM-CAD), which analyzes circuits, optimizes DC operating points, performs inference-based sizing and executes external sizing optimization. We integrate Image2Net to annotate circuit schematics and generate a structured JSON description for precise interpretation by Vision Language Models. Furthermore, we propose an Explainable Trust Region Bayesian Optimization method (ExTuRBO) that employs collaborative warm-starting from agent-generated seeds and offers dual-granularity sensitivity analysis for external sizing optimization, supporting a comprehensive final design report. Experiment results on amplifier sizing tasks using 180nm, 90nm, and 45nm Predictive Technology Models demonstrate that VLM-CAD effectively balances power and performance, achieving a 100% success rate in optimizing an amplifier with a complementary input and a class-AB output stage, while maintaining total runtime under 43 minutes across all experiments.
tldr: The paper introduces VLM-CAD, a vision language model-optimized workflow for analog circuit sizing, which leverages circuit schematics, explainable optimization methods, and Image2Net for enhanced performance and explainability, demonstrating a 100% success rate in amplifier optimization tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了VLM-CAD，一种用于模拟电路尺寸设计的视觉语言模型优化工作流程，该流程利用电路原理图、可解释的优化方法和Image2Net来增强性能和可解释性，并在放大器优化任务中实现了100% 的成功率。
summary_zh: 模拟混合信号电路尺寸设计涉及高维设计空间内的复杂权衡。现有的自动模拟电路尺寸设计方法通常未能充分利用电路原理图，并且缺乏行业采纳所需的解释性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种视觉语言模型优化的协同代理设计工作流程（VLM-CAD），该流程分析电路、优化直流工作点、执行基于推理的尺寸设计以及执行外部尺寸优化。我们集成了 Image2Net 来注释电路原理图并生成结构化的 JSON 描述，以便视觉语言模型进行精确解读。此外，我们提出了一种可解释的信任域贝叶斯优化方法（ExTuRBO），该方法采用来自代理生成种子的协同热启动，并为外部尺寸优化提供双粒度灵敏度分析，支持全面的最终设计报告。使用180nm、90nm和45nm预测技术模型的放大器尺寸设计任务的实验结果表明，VLM-CAD有效地平衡了功耗和性能，在优化具有互补型输入和AB类输出级的放大器时实现了100%的成功率，同时保持所有实验的总运行时间在43分钟以内。

title: When Bots Take the Bait: Exposing and Mitigating the Emerging Social Engineering Attack in Web Automation Agent
summary:
Web agents, powered by large language models (LLMs), are increasingly deployed to automate complex web interactions. The rise of open-source frameworks (e.g., Browser Use, Skyvern-AI) has accelerated adoption, but also broadened the attack surface. While prior research has focused on model threats such as prompt injection and backdoors, the risks of social engineering remain largely unexplored. We present the first systematic study of social engineering attacks against web automation agents and design a pluggable runtime mitigation solution. On the attack side, we introduce the AgentBait paradigm, which exploits intrinsic weaknesses in agent execution: inducement contexts can distort the agent's reasoning and steer it toward malicious objectives misaligned with the intended task. On the defense side, we propose SUPERVISOR, a lightweight runtime module that enforces environment and intention consistency alignment between webpage context and intended goals to mitigate unsafe operations before execution.
  Empirical results show that mainstream frameworks are highly vulnerable to AgentBait, with an average attack success rate of 67.5% and peaks above 80% under specific strategies (e.g., trusted identity forgery). Compared with existing lightweight defenses, our module can be seamlessly integrated across different web automation frameworks and reduces attack success rates by up to 78.1% on average while incurring only a 7.7% runtime overhead and preserving usability. This work reveals AgentBait as a critical new threat surface for web agents and establishes a practical, generalizable defense, advancing the security of this rapidly emerging ecosystem. We reported the details of this attack to the framework developers and received acknowledgment before submission.
tldr: This paper identifies and mitigates a new social engineering attack, AgentBait, targeting web automation agents powered by LLMs, achieving significant defense while maintaining usability.
tldr_zh: 本文识别并缓解了一种新型的社会工程攻击 AgentBait，该攻击针对由 LLM 驱动的 Web 自动化代理，在保持可用性的同时实现了显着的防御。
summary_zh:
由大型语言模型（LLM）驱动的Web代理正被越来越多地部署以自动化复杂的Web交互。开源框架（例如Browser Use、Skyvern-AI）的兴起加速了这一应用，但也扩大了攻击面。虽然之前的研究主要集中在模型威胁，如提示注入和后门，但社会工程学的风险在很大程度上仍未被探索。我们首次对针对Web自动化代理的社会工程学攻击进行了系统性研究，并设计了一个可插拔的运行时缓解方案。在攻击方面，我们引入了AgentBait范式，它利用了代理执行中固有的弱点：诱导上下文会扭曲代理的推理，并将其导向与预期任务不符的恶意目标。在防御方面，我们提出了SUPERVISOR，这是一个轻量级的运行时模块，它强制执行网页上下文与预期目标之间的环境和意图一致性对齐，以缓解执行前的不安全操作。
经验结果表明，主流框架极易受到AgentBait的攻击，平均攻击成功率为67.5%，并且在特定策略下（例如，可信身份伪造）达到80%以上。与现有的轻量级防御措施相比，我们的模块可以无缝集成到不同的Web自动化框架中，并且平均降低了高达78.1%的攻击成功率，同时仅产生7.7%的运行时开销并保持可用性。这项工作揭示了AgentBait作为Web代理的一个关键新威胁面，并建立了一个实际、可推广的防御机制，从而提高了这个快速发展生态系统的安全性。我们在提交前向框架开发者报告了此攻击的详细信息，并收到了确认。

title: CloneMem: Benchmarking Long-Term Memory for AI Clones
summary: AI Clones aim to simulate an individual's thoughts and behaviors to enable long-term, personalized interaction, placing stringent demands on memory systems to model experiences, emotions, and opinions over time. Existing memory benchmarks primarily rely on user-agent conversational histories, which are temporally fragmented and insufficient for capturing continuous life trajectories. We introduce CloneMem, a benchmark for evaluating longterm memory in AI Clone scenarios grounded in non-conversational digital traces, including diaries, social media posts, and emails, spanning one to three years. CloneMem adopts a hierarchical data construction framework to ensure longitudinal coherence and defines tasks that assess an agent's ability to track evolving personal states. Experiments show that current memory mechanisms struggle in this setting, highlighting open challenges for life-grounded personalized AI. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/AvatarMemory/CloneMemBench
tldr: The paper introduces CloneMem, a new benchmark for evaluating long-term memory in AI clones based on non-conversational digital traces, revealing limitations of current memory mechanisms in capturing evolving personal states.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了CloneMem，一个新的基准，用于评估基于非对话数字痕迹的AI克隆中的长期记忆，揭示了当前记忆机制在捕获不断发展的个人状态方面的局限性。
summary_zh: AI克隆旨在模拟个体的思想和行为，以实现长期、个性化的互动，这对记忆系统提出了严格要求，需要在时间推移中对经历、情感和观点进行建模。现有的记忆基准主要依赖于用户-代理的对话历史，这些历史在时间上是零碎的，不足以捕捉连续的生活轨迹。我们引入了CloneMem，这是一个评估AI克隆场景中长期记忆的基准，它基于非对话的数字痕迹，包括日记、社交媒体帖子和电子邮件，时间跨度为一到三年。CloneMem采用分层数据构建框架来确保纵向连贯性，并定义了评估代理跟踪不断演变的个人状态能力的任务。实验表明，当前的记忆机制在这种设置下表现不佳，突出了生活场景个性化AI所面临的开放性挑战。代码和数据集可在https://github.com/AvatarMemory/CloneMemBench获取。

title: Leveraging 3D Representation Alignment and RGB Pretrained Priors for LiDAR Scene Generation
summary: LiDAR scene synthesis is an emerging solution to scarcity in 3D data for robotic tasks such as autonomous driving. Recent approaches employ diffusion or flow matching models to generate realistic scenes, but 3D data remains limited compared to RGB datasets with millions of samples. We introduce R3DPA, the first LiDAR scene generation method to unlock image-pretrained priors for LiDAR point clouds, and leverage self-supervised 3D representations for state-of-the-art results. Specifically, we (i) align intermediate features of our generative model with self-supervised 3D features, which substantially improves generation quality; (ii) transfer knowledge from large-scale image-pretrained generative models to LiDAR generation, mitigating limited LiDAR datasets; and (iii) enable point cloud control at inference for object inpainting and scene mixing with solely an unconditional model. On the KITTI-360 benchmark R3DPA achieves state of the art performance. Code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/valeoai/R3DPA.
tldr: The paper introduces R3DPA, a novel LiDAR scene generation method that leverages image-pretrained priors and self-supervised 3D representations to achieve state-of-the-art performance on KITTI-360, also demonstrating point cloud control capabilities.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 R3DPA，一种新型的 LiDAR 场景生成方法，它利用图像预训练先验和自监督 3D 表示，在 KITTI-360 上实现了最先进的性能，同时也展示了点云控制能力。
summary_zh: 激光雷达场景合成是一种新兴的解决方案，旨在缓解机器人任务（如自动驾驶）中3D数据匮乏的问题。最近的方法采用扩散模型或流匹配模型来生成逼真的场景，但与拥有数百万样本的RGB数据集相比，3D数据仍然有限。我们提出了R3DPA，这是第一个用于激光雷达点云的激光雷达场景生成方法，它能够解锁图像预训练的先验知识，并利用自监督3D表示来实现最先进的结果。具体而言，我们（i）将生成模型的中间特征与自监督3D特征对齐，从而显著提高生成质量；（ii）将大规模图像预训练生成模型的知识迁移到激光雷达生成，缓解激光雷达数据集有限的问题；以及（iii）仅使用一个无条件模型，就能在推理时实现点云控制，用于物体修复和场景混合。在KITTI-360基准测试中，R3DPA实现了最先进的性能。代码和预训练模型可在https://github.com/valeoai/R3DPA获取。

title: PanoSAMic: Panoramic Image Segmentation from SAM Feature Encoding and Dual View Fusion
summary: Existing image foundation models are not optimized for spherical images having been trained primarily on perspective images. PanoSAMic integrates the pre-trained Segment Anything (SAM) encoder to make use of its extensive training and integrate it into a semantic segmentation model for panoramic images using multiple modalities. We modify the SAM encoder to output multi-stage features and introduce a novel spatio-modal fusion module that allows the model to select the relevant modalities and best features from each modality for different areas of the input. Furthermore, our semantic decoder uses spherical attention and dual view fusion to overcome the distortions and edge discontinuity often associated with panoramic images. PanoSAMic achieves state-of-the-art (SotA) results on Stanford2D3DS for RGB, RGB-D, and RGB-D-N modalities and on Matterport3D for RGB and RGB-D modalities. https://github.com/dfki-av/PanoSAMic
tldr: PanoSAMic adapts the Segment Anything Model (SAM) for panoramic image semantic segmentation, achieving state-of-the-art results by using multi-stage SAM features, a novel spatio-modal fusion module, and a semantic decoder utilizing spherical attention and dual view fusion.
tldr_zh: PanoSAMic将Segment Anything Model (SAM) 应用于全景图像语义分割，通过利用多阶段SAM特征、一种新颖的时空模态融合模块以及一个利用球面注意力和双视角融合的语义解码器，实现了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 现有的图像基础模型主要基于透视图像进行训练，因此未针对球面图像进行优化。PanoSAMic集成了预训练的Segment Anything (SAM)编码器，以利用其广泛的训练，并将其整合到用于全景图像的多模态语义分割模型中。我们修改了SAM编码器以输出多阶段特征，并引入了一种新颖的时空模态融合模块，该模块允许模型为输入的不同区域选择相关的模态和每种模态的最佳特征。此外，我们的语义解码器使用球面注意力和双视角融合来克服通常与全景图像相关的失真和边缘不连续性。PanoSAMic在Stanford2D3DS上实现了RGB、RGB-D和RGB-D-N模态的最先进 (SotA) 结果，并在Matterport3D上实现了RGB和RGB-D模态的最先进结果。https://github.com/dfki-av/PanoSAMic

title: SceneNAT: Masked Generative Modeling for Language-Guided Indoor Scene Synthesis
summary: We present SceneNAT, a single-stage masked non-autoregressive Transformer that synthesizes complete 3D indoor scenes from natural language instructions through only a few parallel decoding passes, offering improved performance and efficiency compared to prior state-of-the-art approaches. SceneNAT is trained via masked modeling over fully discretized representations of both semantic and spatial attributes. By applying a masking strategy at both the attribute level and the instance level, the model can better capture intra-object and inter-object structure. To boost relational reasoning, SceneNAT employs a dedicated triplet predictor for modeling the scene's layout and object relationships by mapping a set of learnable relation queries to a sparse set of symbolic triplets (subject, predicate, object). Extensive experiments on the 3D-FRONT dataset demonstrate that SceneNAT achieves superior performance compared to state-of-the-art autoregressive and diffusion baselines in both semantic compliance and spatial arrangement accuracy, while operating with substantially lower computational cost.
tldr: SceneNAT is a novel, non-autoregressive Transformer model for language-guided 3D indoor scene synthesis, achieving state-of-the-art performance and efficiency by using masked modeling and triplet prediction to improve relational reasoning.
tldr_zh: SceneNAT是一种新颖的非自回归Transformer模型，用于语言引导的3D室内场景合成。它通过使用掩码建模和三元组预测来提高关系推理，从而实现了最先进的性能和效率。
summary_zh: 我们提出了SceneNAT，一个单阶段掩码非自回归Transformer，它仅通过几次并行解码过程即可从自然语言指令合成完整的3D室内场景，与现有最先进方法相比，提供了更高的性能和效率。SceneNAT通过对语义和空间属性的完全离散化表示进行掩码建模进行训练。通过在属性级别和实例级别应用掩码策略，该模型可以更好地捕捉对象内部和对象之间的结构。为了增强关系推理能力，SceneNAT采用了一个专用的三元组预测器，通过将一组可学习的关系查询映射到一组稀疏的符号三元组（主语、谓语、宾语），来建模场景的布局和对象关系。在3D-FRONT数据集上的大量实验表明，SceneNAT在语义一致性和空间排列准确性方面均优于最先进的自回归和扩散模型，同时计算成本显著降低。

title: ReinPool: Reinforcement Learning Pooling Multi-Vector Embeddings for Retrieval System
summary: Multi-vector embedding models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for document retrieval, preserving fine-grained visual and textual details through token-level representations. However, this expressiveness comes at a staggering cost: storing embeddings for every token inflates index sizes by over $1000\times$ compared to single-vector approaches, severely limiting scalability. We introduce \textbf{ReinPool}, a reinforcement learning framework that learns to dynamically filter and pool multi-vector embeddings into compact, retrieval-optimized representations. By training with an inverse retrieval objective and NDCG-based rewards, ReinPool identifies and retains only the most discriminative vectors without requiring manual importance annotations. On the Vidore V2 benchmark across three vision-language embedding models, ReinPool compresses multi-vector representations by $746$--$1249\times$ into single vectors while recovering 76--81\% of full multi-vector retrieval performance. Compared to static mean pooling baselines, ReinPool achieves 22--33\% absolute NDCG@3 improvement, demonstrating that learned selection significantly outperforms heuristic aggregation.
tldr: ReinPool uses reinforcement learning to dynamically compress multi-vector embeddings for document retrieval, achieving significant compression with minimal performance loss compared to full multi-vector methods and outperforming static pooling baselines.
tldr_zh: ReinPool 使用强化学习动态压缩文档检索的多向量嵌入，与完整的多向量方法相比，实现了显着的压缩且性能损失极小，并且优于静态池化基线。
summary_zh:
摘要：
多向量嵌入模型已成为文档检索的一种强大范式，通过token级别的表示保留了细粒度的视觉和文本细节。然而，这种表达能力带来了惊人的代价：与单向量方法相比，存储每个token的嵌入使索引大小膨胀了超过$1000\times$，严重限制了可扩展性。我们引入了\textbf{ReinPool}，一个强化学习框架，它学习将多向量嵌入动态地过滤和池化成紧凑的、检索优化的表示。通过使用逆检索目标和基于NDCG的奖励进行训练，ReinPool能够识别并保留最具区分性的向量，而无需手动标注重要性。在Vidore V2基准测试中，跨三个视觉-语言嵌入模型，ReinPool将多向量表示压缩了$746$--$1249\times$成为单向量，同时恢复了完整多向量检索性能的76--81\%。与静态均值池化基线相比，ReinPool实现了22--33\%的NDCG@3绝对提升，表明学习到的选择显著优于启发式聚合。

title: GRPO with State Mutations: Improving LLM-Based Hardware Test Plan Generation
summary: RTL design often relies heavily on ad-hoc testbench creation early in the design cycle. While large language models (LLMs) show promise for RTL code generation, their ability to reason about hardware specifications and generate targeted test plans remains largely unexplored. We present the first systematic study of LLM reasoning capabilities for RTL verification stimuli generation, establishing a two-stage framework that decomposes test plan generation from testbench execution. Our benchmark reveals that state-of-the-art models, including DeepSeek-R1 and Claude-4.0-Sonnet, achieve only 15.7-21.7% success rates on generating stimuli that pass golden RTL designs. To improve LLM generated stimuli, we develop a comprehensive training methodology combining supervised fine-tuning with a novel reinforcement learning approach, GRPO with State Mutation (GRPO-SMu), which enhances exploration by varying input mutations. Our approach leverages a tree-based branching mutation strategy to construct training data comprising equivalent and mutated trees, moving beyond linear mutation approaches to provide rich learning signals. Training on this curated dataset, our 7B parameter model achieves a 33.3% golden test pass rate and a 13.9% mutation detection rate, representing a 17.6% absolute improvement over baseline and outperforming much larger general-purpose models. These results demonstrate that specialized training methodologies can significantly enhance LLM reasoning capabilities for hardware verification tasks, establishing a foundation for automated sub-unit testing in semiconductor design workflows.
tldr: This paper introduces GRPO-SMu, a reinforcement learning approach with state mutations, to improve LLM-based hardware test plan generation, achieving significant performance gains compared to baseline models and larger general-purpose models.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于强化学习的方法 GRPO-SMu，该方法通过状态变异来改进基于 LLM 的硬件测试计划生成。与基线模型和更大的通用模型相比，该方法取得了显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: RTL设计通常在设计周期的早期阶段严重依赖于临时测试平台的创建。虽然大型语言模型（LLM）在RTL代码生成方面展现潜力，但它们对硬件规范进行推理并生成有针对性的测试计划的能力在很大程度上仍未被探索。我们首次对LLM在RTL验证激励生成中的推理能力进行系统研究，建立了一个两阶段框架，将测试计划生成与测试平台执行分离。我们的基准测试表明，包括DeepSeek-R1和Claude-4.0-Sonnet在内的最先进模型在生成通过黄金RTL设计的激励方面，成功率仅为15.7-21.7%。为了改进LLM生成的激励，我们开发了一种综合训练方法，将监督微调与一种新颖的强化学习方法相结合，即具有状态变异的GRPO（GRPO-SMu），通过改变输入变异来增强探索能力。我们的方法利用基于树的分支变异策略来构建包含等效和变异树的训练数据，超越了线性变异方法，提供了丰富的学习信号。通过在这个精心策划的数据集上进行训练，我们的7B参数模型实现了33.3%的黄金测试通过率和13.9%的变异检测率，相对于基线模型绝对提升了17.6%，并且优于更大的通用模型。这些结果表明，专门的训练方法可以显著增强LLM在硬件验证任务中的推理能力，为半导体设计工作流程中的自动化子单元测试奠定基础。

title: Stagewise Reinforcement Learning and the Geometry of the Regret Landscape
summary: Singular learning theory characterizes Bayesian learning as an evolving tradeoff between accuracy and complexity, with transitions between qualitatively different solutions as sample size increases. We extend this theory to deep reinforcement learning, proving that the concentration of the generalized posterior over policies is governed by the local learning coefficient (LLC), an invariant of the geometry of the regret function. This theory predicts that Bayesian phase transitions in reinforcement learning should proceed from simple policies with high regret to complex policies with low regret. We verify this prediction empirically in a gridworld environment exhibiting stagewise policy development: phase transitions over SGD training manifest as "opposing staircases" where regret decreases sharply while the LLC increases. Notably, the LLC detects phase transitions even when estimated on a subset of states where the policies appear identical in terms of regret, suggesting it captures changes in the underlying algorithm rather than just performance.
tldr: The paper extends singular learning theory to deep reinforcement learning, demonstrating how the geometry of the regret function and the local learning coefficient (LLC) govern Bayesian phase transitions and stagewise policy development. They empirically validated their theory in a gridworld environment.
tldr_zh: 该论文将奇异学习理论扩展到深度强化学习，展示了后悔函数的几何结构和局部学习系数（LLC）如何控制贝叶斯相变和阶段性策略发展。他们在网格世界环境中对他们的理论进行了实证验证。
summary_zh: 奇异学习理论将贝叶斯学习描述为精度和复杂度之间不断演化的权衡，随着样本量的增加，会在不同性质的解之间发生跃迁。我们将这一理论扩展到深度强化学习，证明了广义后验策略的集中度受局部学习系数 (LLC) 控制，LLC 是后悔函数几何结构的不变量。该理论预测，强化学习中的贝叶斯相变应从具有高后悔值的简单策略过渡到具有低后悔值的复杂策略。我们在一个展示阶段性策略发展的网格世界环境中验证了这一预测：SGD训练中的相变表现为“相反的阶梯”，即后悔值急剧下降而LLC增加。值得注意的是，即使在策略在后悔值方面看起来相同的一部分状态上进行估计，LLC 也能检测到相变，这表明它捕获的是底层算法的变化，而不仅仅是性能的变化。

title: Reward-Preserving Attacks For Robust Reinforcement Learning
summary: Adversarial robustness in RL is difficult because perturbations affect entire trajectories: strong attacks can break learning, while weak attacks yield little robustness, and the appropriate strength varies by state. We propose $α$-reward-preserving attacks, which adapt the strength of the adversary so that an $α$ fraction of the nominal-to-worst-case return gap remains achievable at each state. In deep RL, we use a gradient-based attack direction and learn a state-dependent magnitude $η\le η_{\mathcal B}$ selected via a critic $Q^π_α((s,a),η)$ trained off-policy over diverse radii. This adaptive tuning calibrates attack strength and, with intermediate $α$, improves robustness across radii while preserving nominal performance, outperforming fixed- and random-radius baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces α-reward-preserving attacks, an adaptive adversarial training method for robust RL that adjusts attack strength based on state to maintain a fraction of the nominal reward gap, demonstrating improved robustness without sacrificing nominal performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种α-奖励保持攻击方法，这是一种自适应对抗训练方法，用于增强强化学习的鲁棒性。该方法根据状态调整攻击强度，以保持一部分名义奖励差距，从而在不牺牲名义性能的前提下提高鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 强化学习中的对抗鲁棒性非常困难，因为扰动会影响整个轨迹：强攻击会破坏学习，而弱攻击几乎无法提高鲁棒性，并且适当的攻击强度随状态变化。我们提出 $α$-奖励保持攻击，该攻击调整对抗者的强度，使得在每个状态下，标称情形到最坏情形回报差距的 $α$ 部分仍然可实现。在深度强化学习中，我们使用基于梯度的攻击方向，并学习一个状态相关的幅度 $η\le η_{\mathcal B}$，该幅度通过评论家 $Q^π_α((s,a),η)$ 选择， 该评论家基于多种半径进行离策略训练。这种自适应调整校准了攻击强度，并且在中间 $α$ 值下，提高了跨半径的鲁棒性，同时保留了标称性能，优于固定半径和随机半径基线。

title: LOONG: Online Time-Optimal Autonomous Flight for MAVs in Cluttered Environments
summary: Autonomous flight of micro air vehicles (MAVs) in unknown, cluttered environments remains challenging for time-critical missions due to conservative maneuvering strategies. This article presents an integrated planning and control framework for high-speed, time-optimal autonomous flight of MAVs in cluttered environments. In each replanning cycle (100 Hz), a time-optimal trajectory under polynomial presentation is generated as a reference, with the time-allocation process accelerated by imitation learning. Subsequently, a time-optimal model predictive contouring control (MPCC) incorporates safe flight corridor (SFC) constraints at variable horizon steps to enable aggressive yet safe maneuvering, while fully exploiting the MAV's dynamics. We validate the proposed framework extensively on a custom-built LiDAR-based MAV platform. Simulation results demonstrate superior aggressiveness compared to the state of the art, while real-world experiments achieve a peak speed of 18 m/s in a cluttered environment and succeed in 10 consecutive trials from diverse start points. The video is available at the following link: https://youtu.be/vexXXhv99oQ.
tldr: This paper presents an integrated planning and control framework (LOONG) for time-optimal autonomous flight of MAVs in cluttered environments, achieving high speeds and success rates in real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种集成的规划和控制框架 (LOONG)，用于在杂乱环境中实现 MAV 的时间最优自主飞行，并在实际环境中实现了高速度和成功率。
summary_zh: 在未知、拥挤环境中，微型飞行器 (MAV) 的自主飞行仍然面临挑战，尤其是在时间紧迫的任务中，原因在于其保守的机动策略。本文提出了一种集成的规划与控制框架，用于 MAV 在拥挤环境中实现高速、时间最优的自主飞行。在每个重规划周期 (100 Hz) 中，生成一条时间最优的、基于多项式表达的参考轨迹，并通过模仿学习加速时间分配过程。随后，一种时间最优的模型预测轮廓控制 (MPCC) 在可变视界步长中整合了安全飞行走廊 (SFC) 约束，从而实现激进且安全的机动飞行，同时充分利用MAV的动力学特性。 我们在一个定制的、基于激光雷达的 MAV 平台上对所提出的框架进行了广泛的验证。仿真结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，其具有更高的激进性，而真实世界的实验在一个拥挤的环境中实现了 18 米/秒的峰值速度，并且从不同的起点成功进行了 10 次连续试验。视频链接如下：https://youtu.be/vexXXhv99oQ。

title: Mon3tr: Monocular 3D Telepresence with Pre-built Gaussian Avatars as Amortization
summary: Immersive telepresence aims to transform human interaction in AR/VR applications by enabling lifelike full-body holographic representations for enhanced remote collaboration. However, existing systems rely on hardware-intensive multi-camera setups and demand high bandwidth for volumetric streaming, limiting their real-time performance on mobile devices. To overcome these challenges, we propose Mon3tr, a novel Monocular 3D telepresence framework that integrates 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) based parametric human modeling into telepresence for the first time. Mon3tr adopts an amortized computation strategy, dividing the process into a one-time offline multi-view reconstruction phase to build a user-specific avatar and a monocular online inference phase during live telepresence sessions. A single monocular RGB camera is used to capture body motions and facial expressions in real time to drive the 3DGS-based parametric human model, significantly reducing system complexity and cost. The extracted motion and appearance features are transmitted at < 0.2 Mbps over WebRTC's data channel, allowing robust adaptation to network fluctuations. On the receiver side, e.g., Meta Quest 3, we develop a lightweight 3DGS attribute deformation network to dynamically generate corrective 3DGS attribute adjustments on the pre-built avatar, synthesizing photorealistic motion and appearance at ~ 60 FPS. Extensive experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of our method, achieving a PSNR of > 28 dB for novel poses, an end-to-end latency of ~ 80 ms, and > 1000x bandwidth reduction compared to point-cloud streaming, while supporting real-time operation from monocular inputs across diverse scenarios. Our demos can be found at https://mon3tr3d.github.io.
tldr: The paper introduces Mon3tr, a monocular 3D telepresence system that uses pre-built Gaussian avatars and a lightweight deformation network to achieve real-time, low-bandwidth telepresence with a single RGB camera, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance in terms of PSNR, latency, and bandwidth reduction.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种单目3D远程呈现系统Mon3tr，该系统使用预先构建的高斯头像和轻量级变形网络，通过单个RGB相机实现实时、低带宽的远程呈现，并在PSNR、延迟和带宽降低方面表现出最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 沉浸式远程呈现旨在通过实现逼真的全身全息表示，增强远程协作，从而改变AR/VR应用中的人机交互方式。然而，现有 systems 依赖于硬件密集型的多摄像头设置，并需要高带宽进行体数据流传输，限制了它们在移动设备上的实时性能。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了 Mon3tr，一种新颖的单目 3D 远程呈现框架，首次将基于 3D 高斯溅射 (3DGS) 的参数化人体建模集成到远程呈现中。Mon3tr 采用了一种分摊计算策略，将该过程分为一次性的离线多视角重建阶段，用于构建用户特定的化身，以及在线单目推断阶段，用于实时远程呈现会话期间。利用单个单目 RGB 相机实时捕获身体运动和面部表情，以驱动基于 3DGS 的参数化人体模型，从而显著降低了系统复杂性和成本。提取的运动和外观特征通过 WebRTC 的数据通道以 < 0.2 Mbps 的速率传输，从而实现了对网络波动的鲁棒适应。在接收端，例如 Meta Quest 3，我们开发了一种轻量级的 3DGS 属性形变网络，用于动态生成对预构建化身的修正性 3DGS 属性调整，以约 60 FPS 的速度合成逼真的运动和外观。广泛的实验表明了我们方法的最先进性能，在新的姿势下实现了 > 28 dB 的 PSNR，端到端延迟约为 80 ms，并且与点云流传输相比，带宽减少了 > 1000 倍，同时支持在各种场景中从单目输入进行实时操作。我们的演示可以在 https://mon3tr3d.github.io 上找到。

title: Aggregating swarms through morphology handling design contingencies: from the sweet spot to a rich expressivity
summary: Morphological computing, the use of the physical design of a robot to ease the realization of a given task has been proven to be a relevant concept in the context of swarm robotics. Here we demonstrate both experimentally and numerically, that the success of such a strategy may heavily rely on the type of policy adopted by the robots, as well as on the details of the physical design. To do so, we consider a swarm of robots, composed of Kilobots embedded in an exoskeleton, the design of which controls the propensity of the robots to align or anti-align with the direction of the external force they experience. We find experimentally that the contrast that was observed between the two morphologies in the success rate of a simple phototactic task, where the robots were programmed to stop when entering a light region, becomes dramatic, if the robots are not allowed to stop, and can only slow down. Building on a faithful physical model of the self-aligning dynamics of the robots, we perform numerical simulations and demonstrate on one hand that a precise tuning of the self-aligning strength around a sweet spot is required to achieve an efficient phototactic behavior, on the other hand that exploring a range of self-alignment strength allows for a rich expressivity of collective behaviors.
tldr: This paper explores how robot morphology influences swarm behavior in a phototactic task, demonstrating that carefully designed morphology can lead to efficient task completion and a diverse range of collective behaviors, especially related to self-alignment strength.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了机器人形态如何影响集群在趋光任务中的行为，证明了精心设计的形态结构可以实现高效的任务完成和多样化的集体行为，尤其与自对准强度相关。
summary_zh: 形态计算，即利用机器人的物理设计来简化给定任务的实现，已被证明在集群机器人领域是一个相关的概念。在此，我们通过实验和数值模拟论证了，这种策略的成功可能很大程度上取决于机器人所采用的策略类型以及物理设计的细节。为此，我们考虑一个由机器人群组成的系统，该系统由嵌入外骨骼的千微型机器人(Kilobots)组成，外骨骼的设计控制着机器人与它们所受外力方向对齐或反向对齐的倾向性。我们通过实验发现，在简单的趋光性任务中，当机器人被编程为进入光照区域时停止的情况下，两种形态在成功率上观察到的对比变得非常显著，如果机器人不允许停止而只能减速。基于机器人自对齐动力学的精确物理模型，我们进行了数值模拟，一方面表明，为了实现高效的趋光行为，需要在最佳点附近精确调整自对齐强度；另一方面表明，探索一定范围内的自对齐强度可以实现丰富的集体行为表达。

title: WaveMan: mmWave-Based Room-Scale Human Interaction Perception for Humanoid Robots
summary: Reliable humanoid-robot interaction (HRI) in household environments is constrained by two fundamental requirements, namely robustness to unconstrained user positions and preservation of user privacy. Millimeter-wave (mmWave) sensing inherently supports privacy-preserving interaction, making it a promising modality for room-scale HRI. However, existing mmWave-based interaction-sensing systems exhibit poor spatial generalization at unseen distances or viewpoints. To address this challenge, we introduce WaveMan, a spatially adaptive room-scale perception system that restores reliable human interaction sensing across arbitrary user positions. WaveMan integrates viewpoint alignment and spectrogram enhancement for spatial consistency, with dual-channel attention for robust feature extraction. Experiments across five participants show that, under fixed-position evaluation, WaveMan achieves the same cross-position accuracy as the baseline with five times fewer training positions. In random free-position testing, accuracy increases from 33.00% to 94.33%, enabled by the proposed method. These results demonstrate the feasibility of reliable, privacy-preserving interaction for household humanoid robots across unconstrained user positions.
tldr: The paper introduces WaveMan, a mmWave-based system for robust and privacy-preserving human interaction perception in household environments, enabling reliable HRI for humanoid robots across unconstrained user positions with improved spatial generalization.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了WaveMan，一个基于毫米波的系统，用于在家庭环境中实现鲁棒且保护隐私的人机交互感知。它通过提高空间泛化能力，使人形机器人在不受约束的用户位置上实现可靠的人机交互。
summary_zh: 在家庭环境中实现可靠的人形机器人交互(HRI)受到两个基本要求的制约，即对无约束用户位置的鲁棒性和对用户隐私的保护。毫米波 (mmWave) 感知本身支持保护隐私的交互，使其成为房间尺度HRI的一个有前景的方式。然而，现有的基于毫米波的交互感知系统在未见距离或视点表现出较差的空间泛化性。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 WaveMan，一种空间自适应的房间尺度感知系统，可恢复任意用户位置上的可靠人机交互感知。WaveMan 整合了视点对齐和频谱图增强以实现空间一致性，并采用双通道注意力来进行鲁棒的特征提取。跨五个参与者的实验表明，在固定位置评估下，WaveMan 以五倍于基线的训练位置数量实现了相同的跨位置精度。在随机自由位置测试中，精度从 33.00% 提高到 94.33%，这得益于所提出的方法。这些结果表明，在无约束的用户位置上，用于家庭人形机器人的可靠、保护隐私的交互是可行的。

title: Large-Scale Autonomous Gas Monitoring for Volcanic Environments: A Legged Robot on Mount Etna
summary: Volcanic gas emissions are key precursors of eruptive activity. Yet, obtaining accurate near-surface measurements remains hazardous and logistically challenging, motivating the need for autonomous solutions. Limited mobility in rough volcanic terrain has prevented wheeled systems from performing reliable in situ gas measurements, reducing their usefulness as sensing platforms. We present a legged robotic system for autonomous volcanic gas analysis, utilizing the quadruped ANYmal, equipped with a quadrupole mass spectrometer system. Our modular autonomy stack integrates a mission planning interface, global planner, localization framework, and terrain-aware local navigation. We evaluated the system on Mount Etna across three autonomous missions in varied terrain, achieving successful gas-source detections with autonomy rates of 93-100%. In addition, we conducted a teleoperated mission in which the robot measured natural fumaroles, detecting sulfur dioxide and carbon dioxide. We discuss lessons learned from the gas-analysis and autonomy perspectives, emphasizing the need for adaptive sensing strategies, tighter integration of global and local planning, and improved hardware design.
tldr: This paper presents a legged robot system equipped with a gas spectrometer for autonomous volcanic gas analysis on Mount Etna, demonstrating successful gas-source detection in challenging terrain. It offers insights into autonomous navigation and gas sensing in extreme environments.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种配备气体光谱仪的腿式机器人系统，用于在埃特纳火山上进行自主火山气体分析，展示了在具有挑战性的地形中成功检测气体源的能力。 这为极端环境中的自主导航和气体传感提供了见解。
summary_zh: 火山气体排放是火山喷发活动的关键先兆。然而，获取准确的近地表测量仍然具有危险性且在后勤上具有挑战性，这促使人们需要自主解决方案。轮式系统在崎岖的火山地形中机动性有限，阻碍了它们进行可靠的原位气体测量，降低了它们作为传感平台的效用。我们提出了一种用于自主火山气体分析的腿式机器人系统，采用四足机器人ANYmal，配备四极杆质谱仪系统。我们的模块化自主堆栈集成了任务规划界面、全局规划器、定位框架和地形感知的局部导航。我们在埃特纳火山上，通过三次在不同地形中的自主任务评估了该系统，获得了93-100%的自主率以及成功的气体源探测。此外，我们进行了一次遥控任务，机器人测量了天然喷气孔，探测到了二氧化硫和二氧化碳。我们从气体分析和自主角度讨论了经验教训，强调了对自适应传感策略、全局和局部规划的更紧密集成以及改进的硬件设计的需求。

title: RSLCPP -- Deterministic Simulations Using ROS 2
summary: Simulation is crucial in real-world robotics, offering safe, scalable, and efficient environments for developing applications, ranging from humanoid robots to autonomous vehicles and drones. While the Robot Operating System (ROS) has been widely adopted as the backbone of these robotic applications in both academia and industry, its asynchronous, multiprocess design complicates reproducibility, especially across varying hardware platforms. Deterministic callback execution cannot be guaranteed when computation times and communication delays vary. This lack of reproducibility complicates scientific benchmarking and continuous integration, where consistent results are essential. To address this, we present a methodology to create deterministic simulations using ROS 2 nodes. Our ROS Simulation Library for C++ (RSLCPP) implements this approach, enabling existing nodes to be combined into a simulation routine that yields reproducible results without requiring any code changes. We demonstrate that our approach yields identical results across various CPUs and architectures when testing both a synthetic benchmark and a real-world robotics system. RSLCPP is open-sourced at https://github.com/TUMFTM/rslcpp.
tldr: This paper introduces RSLCPP, a library that enables deterministic simulations within ROS 2 by ensuring reproducible results across different hardware without requiring code modifications to existing ROS 2 nodes.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了RSLCPP，一个通过确保在不同硬件上可复现结果，从而在ROS 2中实现确定性仿真的库，且无需修改现有ROS 2节点中的代码。
summary_zh: 仿真在现实世界的机器人技术中至关重要，它为开发从人形机器人到自动驾驶汽车和无人机的各类应用提供了安全、可扩展且高效的环境。机器人操作系统（ROS）已被广泛采纳为这些机器人应用在学术界和工业界的骨干，但其异步、多进程设计使得重现性变得复杂，尤其是在不同的硬件平台之间。当计算时间和通信延迟发生变化时，无法保证确定性的回调函数执行。这种缺乏重现性使得科学基准测试和持续集成变得复杂，而一致的结果在这些场景中至关重要。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种使用ROS 2节点创建确定性仿真的方法。我们的ROS C++仿真库（RSLCPP）实现了这种方法，允许将现有节点组合成一个仿真例程，从而产生可重现的结果，而无需任何代码更改。我们证明了在测试合成基准和实际机器人系统时，我们的方法在各种CPU和架构上都能产生相同的结果。RSLCPP已在https://github.com/TUMFTM/rslcpp开源。

title: Active Evaluation of General Agents: Problem Definition and Comparison of Baseline Algorithms
summary: As intelligent agents become more generally-capable, i.e. able to master a wide variety of tasks, the complexity and cost of properly evaluating them rises significantly. Tasks that assess specific capabilities of the agents can be correlated and stochastic, requiring many samples for accurate comparisons, leading to added costs. In this paper, we propose a formal definition and a conceptual framework for active evaluation of agents across multiple tasks, which assesses the performance of ranking algorithms as a function of number of evaluation data samples. Rather than curating, filtering, or compressing existing data sets as a preprocessing step, we propose an online framing: on every iteration, the ranking algorithm chooses the task and agents to sample scores from. Then, evaluation algorithms report a ranking of agents on each iteration and their performance is assessed with respect to the ground truth ranking over time. Several baselines are compared under different experimental contexts, with synthetic generated data and simulated online access to real evaluation data from Atari game-playing agents. We find that the classical Elo rating system -- while it suffers from well-known failure modes, in theory -- is a consistently reliable choice for efficient reduction of ranking error in practice. A recently-proposed method, Soft Condorcet Optimization, shows comparable performance to Elo on synthetic data and significantly outperforms Elo on real Atari agent evaluation. When task variation from the ground truth is high, selecting tasks based on proportional representation leads to higher rate of ranking error reduction.
tldr: This paper introduces a framework for actively evaluating general agents across multiple tasks by strategically sampling evaluation data, comparing several baseline ranking algorithms like Elo and Soft Condorcet Optimization, especially in the context of Atari agent evaluation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个主动评估通用代理在多项任务中表现的框架，通过策略性地采样评估数据，比较了几种基线排名算法，如Elo和Soft Condorcet Optimization，尤其是在Atari代理评估的背景下。
summary_zh: 随着智能体变得在能力上更加通用，即能够掌握各种各样的任务，对其进行适当评估的复杂性和成本也显著上升。评估智能体特定能力的各项任务可能具有相关性和随机性，需要大量的样本才能进行准确的比较，从而导致成本增加。在本文中，我们提出了一个正式的定义和一个概念框架，用于对跨多任务的智能体进行主动评估，该框架评估排序算法的性能与评估数据样本数量的关系。 我们提出的方法不是像预处理步骤那样整理、过滤或压缩现有数据集，而是采用一种在线框架：在每次迭代中，排序算法选择任务和智能体来从中采样得分。 然后，评估算法在每次迭代中报告智能体的排名，并根据随时间变化的真实排名评估其性能。 在不同的实验背景下，使用合成生成的数据和对Atari游戏智能体进行模拟在线访问真实评估数据的情况下，对多个基线进行了比较。 我们发现，经典的Elo评分系统——尽管它在理论上存在众所周知的失效模式——在实践中始终是降低排名误差的可靠选择。 最近提出的一种称为软康德优化（Soft Condorcet Optimization）的方法在合成数据上表现出与Elo相当的性能，并且在真实的Atari智能体评估中明显优于Elo。 当任务与真实情况的差异较大时，基于比例代表性选择任务会导致更高的排名误差降低率。

title: Pheromone-Focused Ant Colony Optimization algorithm for path planning
summary: Ant Colony Optimization (ACO) is a prominent swarm intelligence algorithm extensively applied to path planning. However, traditional ACO methods often exhibit shortcomings, such as blind search behavior and slow convergence within complex environments. To address these challenges, this paper proposes the Pheromone-Focused Ant Colony Optimization (PFACO) algorithm, which introduces three key strategies to enhance the problem-solving ability of the ant colony. First, the initial pheromone distribution is concentrated in more promising regions based on the Euclidean distances of nodes to the start and end points, balancing the trade-off between exploration and exploitation. Second, promising solutions are reinforced during colony iterations to intensify pheromone deposition along high-quality paths, accelerating convergence while maintaining solution diversity. Third, a forward-looking mechanism is implemented to penalize redundant path turns, promoting smoother and more efficient solutions. These strategies collectively produce the focused pheromones to guide the ant colony's search, which enhances the global optimization capabilities of the PFACO algorithm, significantly improving convergence speed and solution quality across diverse optimization problems. The experimental results demonstrate that PFACO consistently outperforms comparative ACO algorithms in terms of convergence speed and solution quality.
tldr: The paper introduces PFACO, an enhanced Ant Colony Optimization algorithm for path planning that focuses pheromone distribution, reinforces promising solutions, and penalizes redundant turns to improve convergence speed and solution quality.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种增强的蚁群优化算法 PFACO，用于路径规划，它集中了信息素分布，强化了有希望的解决方案，并惩罚了冗余转弯，从而提高了收敛速度和解决方案质量。
summary_zh: 蚁群优化（ACO）是一种显著的群体智能算法，广泛应用于路径规划。然而，传统的蚁群优化方法通常表现出盲目搜索行为以及在复杂环境中收敛速度慢等缺点。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种信息素聚焦的蚁群优化（PFACO）算法，该算法引入了三个关键策略来增强蚁群的求解能力。首先，基于节点到起点和终点的欧几里得距离，将初始信息素分布集中在更有希望的区域，平衡了探索和利用之间的权衡。其次，在蚁群迭代过程中强化有希望的解，以增强高质量路径上的信息素沉积，在保持解多样性的同时加速收敛。第三，实施了一种前瞻性机制来惩罚冗余的路径转弯，从而促进更平滑和更高效的解。这些策略共同产生了聚焦的信息素来引导蚁群的搜索，从而增强了PFACO算法的全局优化能力，显著提高了各种优化问题的收敛速度和解的质量。实验结果表明，PFACO在收敛速度和解的质量方面始终优于对比的ACO算法。

title: CtrlFuse: Mask-Prompt Guided Controllable Infrared and Visible Image Fusion
summary: Infrared and visible image fusion generates all-weather perception-capable images by combining complementary modalities, enhancing environmental awareness for intelligent unmanned systems. Existing methods either focus on pixel-level fusion while overlooking downstream task adaptability or implicitly learn rigid semantics through cascaded detection/segmentation models, unable to interactively address diverse semantic target perception needs. We propose CtrlFuse, a controllable image fusion framework that enables interactive dynamic fusion guided by mask prompts. The model integrates a multi-modal feature extractor, a reference prompt encoder (RPE), and a prompt-semantic fusion module (PSFM). The RPE dynamically encodes task-specific semantic prompts by fine-tuning pre-trained segmentation models with input mask guidance, while the PSFM explicitly injects these semantics into fusion features. Through synergistic optimization of parallel segmentation and fusion branches, our method achieves mutual enhancement between task performance and fusion quality. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art results in both fusion controllability and segmentation accuracy, with the adapted task branch even outperforming the original segmentation model.
tldr: CtrlFuse introduces a controllable infrared and visible image fusion framework guided by mask prompts, achieving state-of-the-art results in both fusion controllability and segmentation accuracy, even outperforming original segmentation models in adapted tasks.
tldr_zh: CtrlFuse 提出了一种由掩码提示引导的可控红外和可见图像融合框架，在融合可控性和分割精度方面都取得了最先进的结果，甚至在适应的任务中优于原始分割模型。
summary_zh: 红外与可见光图像融合通过结合互补模态生成具备全天候感知能力的图像，从而增强智能无人系统对环境的感知能力。现有方法要么侧重于像素级融合而忽略下游任务的适应性，要么通过级联的检测/分割模型隐式地学习刚性的语义信息，无法交互式地满足多样化的语义目标感知需求。我们提出了一种可控图像融合框架CtrlFuse，它能够实现由掩码提示引导的交互式动态融合。该模型集成了多模态特征提取器、参考提示编码器（RPE）以及提示-语义融合模块（PSFM）。RPE通过使用输入掩码指导微调预训练的分割模型，从而动态地编码任务特定的语义提示，而PSFM将这些语义信息显式地注入到融合特征中。通过并行分割和融合分支的协同优化，我们的方法实现了任务性能与融合质量之间的相互提升。实验表明，该方法在融合可控性和分割准确率方面均取得了最先进的结果，并且适应后的任务分支甚至优于原始分割模型。

title: PALUM: Part-based Attention Learning for Unified Motion Retargeting
summary: Retargeting motion between characters with different skeleton structures is a fundamental challenge in computer animation. When source and target characters have vastly different bone arrangements, maintaining the original motion's semantics and quality becomes increasingly difficult. We present PALUM, a novel approach that learns common motion representations across diverse skeleton topologies by partitioning joints into semantic body parts and applying attention mechanisms to capture spatio-temporal relationships. Our method transfers motion to target skeletons by leveraging these skeleton-agnostic representations alongside target-specific structural information. To ensure robust learning and preserve motion fidelity, we introduce a cycle consistency mechanism that maintains semantic coherence throughout the retargeting process. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior performance in handling diverse skeletal structures while maintaining motion realism and semantic fidelity, even when generalizing to previously unseen skeleton-motion combinations. We will make our implementation publicly available to support future research.
tldr: The paper introduces PALUM, a novel approach for motion retargeting using part-based attention learning to create topology-agnostic motion representations, demonstrating superior performance in handling diverse skeletal structures while maintaining motion realism.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为PALUM的新方法，用于运动重定向，通过基于部分的注意力学习创建拓扑结构无关的运动表示，并在处理各种骨骼结构的同时保持运动的真实感方面表现出卓越的性能。
summary_zh: 将不同骨骼结构的角色之间的动作进行重定向是计算机动画中的一个基本挑战。当源角色和目标角色具有显著不同的骨骼排列时，保持原始动作的语义和质量变得越来越困难。我们提出了一种新颖的方法PALUM，它通过将关节划分为语义身体部分并应用注意力机制来捕捉时空关系，从而学习跨越不同骨骼拓扑的通用动作表示。我们的方法利用这些与骨骼无关的表示以及特定于目标的结构信息，将动作转移到目标骨骼。为了确保稳健的学习并保持动作的保真度，我们引入了一种循环一致性机制，该机制在整个重定向过程中保持语义连贯性。大量的实验表明，在处理不同的骨骼结构时，我们的方法表现出优越的性能，同时保持了动作的真实感和语义保真度，即使在推广到先前未见过的骨骼-动作组合时也是如此。我们将公开我们的实现，以支持未来的研究。

title: SC-MII: Infrastructure LiDAR-based 3D Object Detection on Edge Devices for Split Computing with Multiple Intermediate Outputs Integration
summary: 3D object detection using LiDAR-based point cloud data and deep neural networks is essential in autonomous driving technology. However, deploying state-of-the-art models on edge devices present challenges due to high computational demands and energy consumption. Additionally, single LiDAR setups suffer from blind spots. This paper proposes SC-MII, multiple infrastructure LiDAR-based 3D object detection on edge devices for Split Computing with Multiple Intermediate outputs Integration. In SC-MII, edge devices process local point clouds through the initial DNN layers and send intermediate outputs to an edge server. The server integrates these features and completes inference, reducing both latency and device load while improving privacy. Experimental results on a real-world dataset show a 2.19x speed-up and a 71.6% reduction in edge device processing time, with at most a 1.09% drop in accuracy.
tldr: The paper introduces SC-MII, a split computing approach for 3D object detection using infrastructure LiDAR on edge devices, achieving speed-up and reduced processing time with minimal accuracy loss.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SC-MII，一种用于在边缘设备上使用基础设施激光雷达进行3D对象检测的拆分计算方法，实现了加速并减少了处理时间，且精度损失最小。
summary_zh: 基于激光雷达点云数据和深度神经网络的3D目标检测在自动驾驶技术中至关重要。然而，在边缘设备上部署最先进的模型面临着计算需求高和能量消耗大的挑战。此外，单激光雷达设置存在盲区。本文提出SC-MII，一种基于多基础设施激光雷达、用于分割计算并集成多个中间输出的、在边缘设备上实现的3D目标检测方法。在SC-MII中，边缘设备通过初始的DNN层处理本地点云并将中间输出发送到边缘服务器。服务器集成这些特征并完成推理，从而在提高隐私性的同时，降低延迟和设备负载。在真实数据集上的实验结果表明，速度提升了2.19倍，边缘设备处理时间减少了71.6%，且精度最多下降1.09%。

title: Dual-Level Models for Physics-Informed Multi-Step Time Series Forecasting
summary: This paper develops an approach for multi-step forecasting of dynamical systems by integrating probabilistic input forecasting with physics-informed output prediction. Accurate multi-step forecasting of time series systems is important for the automatic control and optimization of physical processes, enabling more precise decision-making. While mechanistic-based and data-driven machine learning (ML) approaches have been employed for time series forecasting, they face significant limitations. Incomplete knowledge of process mathematical models limits mechanistic-based direct employment, while purely data-driven ML models struggle with dynamic environments, leading to poor generalization. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a dual-level strategy for physics-informed forecasting of dynamical systems. On the first level, input variables are forecast using a hybrid method that integrates a long short-term memory (LSTM) network into probabilistic state transition models (STMs). On the second level, these stochastically predicted inputs are sequentially fed into a physics-informed neural network (PINN) to generate multi-step output predictions. The experimental results of the paper demonstrate that the hybrid input forecasting models achieve a higher log-likelihood and lower mean squared errors (MSE) compared to conventional STMs. Furthermore, the PINNs driven by the input forecasting models outperform their purely data-driven counterparts in terms of MSE and log-likelihood, exhibiting stronger generalization and forecasting performance across multiple test cases.
tldr: This paper proposes a dual-level forecasting strategy combining LSTM-enhanced probabilistic state transition models for input forecasting and Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) for output prediction, demonstrating improved accuracy and generalization in time series forecasting.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种双层预测策略，结合了LSTM增强的概率状态转移模型进行输入预测，以及物理信息神经网络（PINN）进行输出预测， демонстрирует более високую точность и общую производительность при прогнозировании временных рядов.
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种将概率输入预测与物理信息输出预测相结合的动力系统多步预测方法。时间序列系统的准确多步预测对于物理过程的自动控制和优化至关重要，能够实现更精确的决策。虽然基于机理的和数据驱动的机器学习（ML）方法已被用于时间序列预测，但它们面临着显著的局限性。对过程数学模型的不完全了解限制了基于机理方法的直接应用，而纯粹数据驱动的 ML 模型在动态环境中表现不佳，导致泛化能力差。为了解决这些局限性，本文提出了一种动力系统物理信息预测的双层策略。在第一层，使用一种混合方法预测输入变量，该方法将长短期记忆（LSTM）网络集成到概率状态转移模型（STM）中。在第二层，这些随机预测的输入被顺序地输入到物理信息神经网络（PINN）中，以生成多步输出预测。本文的实验结果表明，与传统的 STM 相比，混合输入预测模型实现了更高的对数似然和更低的均方误差（MSE）。此外，由输入预测模型驱动的 PINN 在 MSE 和对数似然方面优于纯粹数据驱动的对应模型，在多个测试用例中表现出更强的泛化能力和预测性能。

title: Conditional Normalizing Flows for Forward and Backward Joint State and Parameter Estimation
summary: Traditional filtering algorithms for state estimation -- such as classical Kalman filtering, unscented Kalman filtering, and particle filters - show performance degradation when applied to nonlinear systems whose uncertainty follows arbitrary non-Gaussian, and potentially multi-modal distributions. This study reviews recent approaches to state estimation via nonlinear filtering based on conditional normalizing flows, where the conditional embedding is generated by standard MLP architectures, transformers or selective state-space models (like Mamba-SSM). In addition, we test the effectiveness of an optimal-transport-inspired kinetic loss term in mitigating overparameterization in flows consisting of a large collection of transformations. We investigate the performance of these approaches on applications relevant to autonomous driving and patient population dynamics, paying special attention to how they handle time inversion and chained predictions. Finally, we assess the performance of various conditioning strategies for an application to real-world COVID-19 joint SIR system forecasting and parameter estimation.
tldr: This paper explores using conditional normalizing flows with various architectures (MLP, Transformers, Mamba-SSM) for state and parameter estimation in nonlinear systems, particularly focusing on time inversion and chained predictions, with applications in autonomous driving, patient dynamics, and COVID-19 forecasting.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用条件归一化流以及各种架构（MLP, Transformers, Mamba-SSM）对非线性系统进行状态和参数估计，特别关注时间反演和链式预测，并应用于自动驾驶、患者动力学和 COVID-19预测。
summary_zh: 传统的状态估计滤波算法——例如经典卡尔曼滤波、无迹卡尔曼滤波和粒子滤波——在应用于不确定性遵循任意非高斯且可能呈多峰分布的非线性系统时，性能会下降。本研究综述了基于条件归一化流的非线性滤波状态估计的最新方法，其中条件嵌入由标准MLP架构、Transformer或选择性状态空间模型（如Mamba-SSM）生成。此外，我们测试了受最优传输启发的动力学损失项在缓解由大量变换组成的流中的过度参数化方面的有效性。我们研究了 этих методов 在与自动驾驶和患者群体动态相关的应用中的性能，特别关注它们如何处理时间反演和链式预测。最后，我们评估了各种条件策略在现实世界COVID-19联合SIR系统预测和参数估计应用中的性能。

title: FMAC: a Fair Fiducial Marker Accuracy Comparison Software
summary: This paper presents a method for carrying fair comparisons of the accuracy of pose estimation using fiducial markers. These comparisons rely on large sets of high-fidelity synthetic images enabling deep exploration of the 6 degrees of freedom. A low-discrepancy sampling of the space allows to check the correlations between each degree of freedom and the pose errors by plotting the 36 pairs of combinations. The images are rendered using a physically based ray tracing code that has been specifically developed to use the standard calibration coefficients of any camera directly. The software reproduces image distortions, defocus and diffraction blur. Furthermore, sub-pixel sampling is applied to sharp edges to enhance the fidelity of the rendered image. After introducing the rendering algorithm and its experimental validation, the paper proposes a method for evaluating the pose accuracy. This method is applied to well-known markers, revealing their strengths and weaknesses for pose estimation. The code is open source and available on GitHub.
tldr: The paper introduces FMAC, an open-source software for fair accuracy comparisons of fiducial marker pose estimation using high-fidelity synthetic images and ray tracing, revealing strengths and weaknesses of different markers.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了FMAC，一个开源软件，用于通过高保真合成图像和光线追踪，对 fiducial marker 姿态估计的准确性进行公平比较，揭示不同 marker 的优缺点。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种利用基准标记物对姿态估计精度进行公平比较的方法。这些比较依赖于大量高保真合成图像，从而能够深入探索6个自由度(6DoF)。 通过对空间进行低差异采样，可以检查每个自由度与姿态误差之间的相关性，并通过绘制36对组合来表示。 这些图像使用基于物理的射线追踪代码进行渲染，该代码专门开发用于直接使用任何相机的标准校准系数。该软件可以重现图像畸变、离焦和衍射模糊。此外，亚像素采样应用于锐利边缘，以提高渲染图像的保真度。在介绍了渲染算法及其实验验证之后，本文提出了一种评估姿态精度的方法。该方法被应用于知名标记物，揭示了它们在姿态估计方面的优势和劣势。该代码是开源的，可在GitHub上获得。

title: Stable In-hand Manipulation for a Lightweight Four-motor Prosthetic Hand
summary: Electric prosthetic hands should be lightweight to decrease the burden on the user, shaped like human hands for cosmetic purposes, and designed with motors enclosed inside to protect them from damage and dirt. Additionally, in-hand manipulation is necessary to perform daily activities such as transitioning between different postures, particularly through rotational movements, such as reorienting a pen into a writing posture after picking it up from a desk. We previously developed PLEXUS hand (Precision-Lateral dEXteroUS manipulation hand), a lightweight (311 g) prosthetic hand driven by four motors. This prosthetic performed reorientation between precision and lateral grasps with various objects. However, its controller required predefined object widths and was limited to handling lightweight objects (of weight up to 34 g). This study addresses these limitations by employing motor current feedback. Combined with the hand's previously optimized single-axis thumb, this approach achieves more stable manipulation by estimating the object's width and adjusting the index finger position to maintain stable object holding during the reorientation. Experimental validation using primitive objects of various widths (5-30 mm) and shapes (cylinders and prisms) resulted in a 100% success rate with lightweight objects and maintained a high success rate (>=80) even with heavy aluminum prisms (of weight up to 289 g). By contrast, the performance without index finger coordination dropped to just 40% on the heaviest 289 g prism. The hand also successfully executed several daily tasks, including closing bottle caps and orienting a pen for writing.
tldr: This paper presents an improved controller using motor current feedback for the PLEXUS hand, a lightweight four-motor prosthetic hand, enabling more stable in-hand manipulation with varying object sizes and weights, demonstrated through experiments with primitive objects and daily tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种改进的控制器，该控制器使用电机电流反馈来控制PLEXUS手（一种轻型四电机假肢手），从而能够使用不同尺寸和重量的物体进行更稳定的手内操作。通过对原始物体和日常任务的实验进行了演示。
summary_zh: 电动假肢手需要轻量化以减轻用户负担，外形设计应类似于人手以满足美观需求，并且应将电机封闭在内部，以保护其免受损坏和污垢的影响。此外，为了执行日常活动（例如在不同姿势之间进行转换，特别是通过旋转运动），例如将笔从桌子上拿起后重新调整方向以便书写，还需要手内操作能力。我们之前开发了PLEXUS手 (Precision-Lateral dEXteroUS manipulation hand，精密-侧向灵巧操作手)，这是一款由四个电机驱动的轻量化 (311 g) 假肢手。该假肢能够对各种物体进行精细抓握和侧向抓握之间的重新调整。然而，其控制器需要预定义的物体宽度，并且仅限于处理轻量级物体（重量高达34克）。本研究通过采用电机电流反馈来解决这些限制。结合该假肢先前优化的单轴拇指，这种方法通过估计物体的宽度并调整食指位置以在重新调整方向期间保持物体的稳定保持，从而实现更稳定的操作。使用各种宽度（5-30毫米）和形状（圆柱体和棱柱体）的原始物体进行的实验验证表明，轻量级物体的成功率为100%，即使是重型铝制棱柱体（重量高达289克）也能保持较高的成功率（>=80%）。相比之下，在没有食指协调的情况下，最重的289克棱柱体的性能降至仅40%。该假肢还成功地完成了多项日常任务，包括拧紧瓶盖和调整笔的方向以进行书写。

title: Robust maximum hands-off optimal control: existence, maximum principle, and $L^{0}$-$L^1$ equivalence
summary: This work advances the maximum hands-off sparse control framework by developing a robust counterpart for constrained linear systems with parametric uncertainties. The resulting optimal control problem minimizes an $L^{0}$ objective subject to an uncountable, compact family of constraints, and is therefore a nonconvex, nonsmooth robust optimization problem. To address this, we replace the $L^{0}$ objective with its convex $L^{1}$ surrogate and, using a nonsmooth variant of the robust Pontryagin maximum principle, show that the $L^{0}$ and $L^{1}$ formulations have identical sets of optimal solutions -- we call this the robust hands-off principle. Building on this equivalence, we propose an algorithmic framework -- drawing on numerically viable techniques from the semi-infinite robust optimization literature -- to solve the resulting problems. An illustrative example is provided to demonstrate the effectiveness of the approach.
tldr: This paper tackles robust sparse control for uncertain linear systems by proving the equivalence between L0 and L1 optimization, enabling efficient algorithmic solutions. It focuses on optimal control with constraints and parametric uncertainties.
tldr_zh: 本文通过证明L0和L1优化的等价性，解决了不确定线性系统的鲁棒稀疏控制问题，从而能够实现有效的算法解决方案。它侧重于具有约束和参数不确定性的最优控制。
summary_zh: 本文通过为具有参数不确定性的约束线性系统开发一种鲁棒对应模型，推进了最大免干预稀疏控制框架。由此产生的最优控制问题旨在最小化一个受约束于不可数紧致约束族的$L^{0}$目标函数，因此是一个非凸、非光滑的鲁棒优化问题。为了解决这个问题，我们将$L^{0}$目标函数替换为它的凸$L^{1}$替代函数，并使用鲁棒庞特里亚金最大值原理的非光滑变体，证明了$L^{0}$和$L^{1}$公式具有相同的最优解集——我们称之为鲁棒免干预原则。基于这种等价性，我们提出了一种算法框架——借鉴了半无限鲁棒优化文献中数值上可行的技术——来解决由此产生的问题。提供了一个说明性例子来证明该方法的有效性。

title: Data-Driven Stochastic VRP: Integration of Forecast Duration into Optimization for Utility Workforce Management
summary: This paper investigates the integration of machine learning forecasts of intervention durations into a stochastic variant of the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem with Time Windows (CVRPTW). In particular, we exploit tree-based gradient boosting (XGBoost) trained on eight years of gas meter maintenance data to produce point predictions and uncertainty estimates, which then drive a multi-objective evolutionary optimization routine. The methodology addresses uncertainty through sub-Gaussian concentration bounds for route-level risk buffers and explicitly accounts for competing operational KPIs through a multi-objective formulation. Empirical analysis of prediction residuals validates the sub-Gaussian assumption underlying the risk model. From an empirical point of view, our results report improvements around 20-25\% in operator utilization and completion rates compared with plans computed using default durations. The integration of uncertainty quantification and risk-aware optimization provides a practical framework for handling stochastic service durations in real-world routing applications.
tldr: The paper presents a data-driven stochastic Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP) solution for utility workforce management, integrating XGBoost forecasts of intervention durations and a multi-objective evolutionary optimization routine to improve operator utilization and completion rates.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种数据驱动的随机车辆路径问题（VRP）解决方案，用于公用事业劳动力管理，集成了干预持续时间的XGBoost预测和一个多目标进化优化程序，以提高操作员利用率和完成率。
summary_zh: 本文研究了将干预时长的机器学习预测结果整合到具有时间窗的容量约束车辆路径问题（CVRPTW）的随机变体中。具体而言，我们利用基于树的梯度提升算法（XGBoost），该算法在八年的燃气表维护数据上训练，以生成点预测和不确定性估计，进而驱动多目标进化优化程序。该方法通过子高斯集中界处理路径级别的风险缓冲的不确定性，并通过多目标公式显式地考虑竞争性的运营KPI。对预测残差的实证分析验证了风险模型所基于的子高斯假设。从实证角度来看，我们的结果表明，与使用默认时长计算的计划相比，运营商利用率和完成率提高了约20-25％。不确定性量化和风险感知优化的结合为处理现实世界路由应用中的随机服务时长提供了一个实用的框架。

title: Decentralized Online Convex Optimization with Unknown Feedback Delays
summary: Decentralized online convex optimization (D-OCO), where multiple agents within a network collaboratively learn optimal decisions in real-time, arises naturally in applications such as federated learning, sensor networks, and multi-agent control.  In this paper, we study D-OCO under unknown, time-and agent-varying feedback delays. While recent work has addressed this problem (Nguyen et al., 2024), existing algorithms assume prior knowledge of the total delay over agents and still suffer from suboptimal dependence on both the delay and network parameters. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel algorithm that achieves an improved regret bound of O N $\sqrt$ d tot + N $\sqrt$ T  (1-$σ$2) 1/4 , where T is the total horizon, d tot denotes the average total delay across agents, N is the number of agents, and 1 -$σ$ 2 is the spectral gap of the network. Our approach builds upon recent advances in D-OCO (Wan et al., 2024a), but crucially incorporates an adaptive learning rate mechanism via a decentralized communication protocol. This enables each agent to estimate delays locally using a gossip-based strategy without the prior knowledge of the total delay. We further extend our framework to the strongly convex setting and derive a sharper regret bound of O N $δ$max ln T $α$  , where $α$ is the strong convexity parameter and $δ$ max is the maximum number of missing observations averaged over agents. We also show that our upper bounds for both settings are tight up to logarithmic factors. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of our approach, showing improvements over existing benchmark algorithms.
tldr: This paper presents a decentralized online convex optimization (D-OCO) algorithm with improved regret bounds for scenarios with unknown and time-varying feedback delays by using an adaptive learning rate estimated with a gossip-based strategy. It extends the work to strongly convex settings and validates the results through experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种去中心化在线凸优化（D-OCO）算法，该算法通过使用基于 gossip 的策略估计的自适应学习率，改进了具有未知和时变反馈延迟场景的遗憾界限。 它将工作扩展到强凸设置，并通过实验验证了结果。
summary_zh: 分散式在线凸优化 (D-OCO) 在诸如联邦学习、传感器网络和多智能体控制等应用中自然产生，它涉及网络内的多个智能体实时协同学习最优决策。本文研究了在未知、随时间和智能体变化的反馈延迟下的 D-OCO。虽然最近的工作已经解决了这个问题 (Nguyen et al., 2024)，但现有算法假设已知所有智能体上的总延迟，并且仍然受到对延迟和网络参数的次优依赖性的影响。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种新算法，该算法实现了 O N $\sqrt$ d tot + N $\sqrt$ T  (1-$σ$2) 1/4 的改进遗憾界，其中 T 是总时间范围，d tot 表示智能体上的平均总延迟，N 是智能体的数量，而 1 -$σ$ 2 是网络的谱隙。 我们的方法建立在 D-OCO 的最新进展 (Wan et al., 2024a) 的基础上，但至关重要的是，通过分散式通信协议整合了一种自适应学习率机制。 这使得每个智能体能够使用基于 Gossip 的策略，在没有总延迟的先验知识的情况下，本地估计延迟。 我们进一步将我们的框架扩展到强凸设置，并推导出 O N $δ$max ln T $α$  的更严格的遗憾界，其中 $α$ 是强凸参数，而 $δ$ max 是智能体平均的最大缺失观测数。 我们还表明，我们在两种设置下的上界在对数因子范围内都是紧的。 实验结果验证了我们方法的有效性，表明与现有基准算法相比有所改进。

title: Billboard in Focus: Estimating Driver Gaze Duration from a Single Image
summary: Roadside billboards represent a central element of outdoor advertising, yet their presence may contribute to driver distraction and accident risk. This study introduces a fully automated pipeline for billboard detection and driver gaze duration estimation, aiming to evaluate billboard relevance without reliance on manual annotations or eye-tracking devices. Our pipeline operates in two stages: (1) a YOLO-based object detection model trained on Mapillary Vistas and fine-tuned on BillboardLamac images achieved 94% mAP@50 in the billboard detection task (2) a classifier based on the detected bounding box positions and DINOv2 features. The proposed pipeline enables estimation of billboard driver gaze duration from individual frames. We show that our method is able to achieve 68.1% accuracy on BillboardLamac when considering individual frames. These results are further validated using images collected from Google Street View.
tldr: This paper introduces a pipeline for detecting billboards and estimating driver gaze duration from single images using YOLO and DINOv2 features, achieving 68.1% accuracy on the BillboardLamac dataset. The research aims to evaluate billboard relevance and potential driver distraction without manual annotation.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个流水线，用于检测广告牌并使用 YOLO 和 DINOv2 特征从单张图像中估计驾驶员注视时间，在 BillboardLamac 数据集上实现了 68.1% 的准确率。该研究旨在评估广告牌的相关性和潜在的驾驶员分心情况，无需手动标注。
summary_zh: 路边广告牌是户外广告的核心组成部分，但它们的存在可能会分散驾驶员的注意力并增加事故风险。本研究介绍了一种全自动的广告牌检测和驾驶员注视时长估计流程，旨在评估广告牌的相关性，而无需依赖人工标注或眼动追踪设备。 我们的流程分两个阶段进行：（1）基于YOLO的目标检测模型训练于Mapillary Vistas数据集，并在BillboardLamac图像上进行微调，在广告牌检测任务中实现了94%的mAP@50；（2）一个基于检测到的边界框位置和DINOv2特征的分类器。所提出的流程能够从单帧图像中估计广告牌的驾驶员注视时长。 我们证明了在考虑单帧图像时，我们的方法在BillboardLamac数据集上能够实现68.1%的准确率。这些结果通过从谷歌街景收集的图像进一步验证。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Micro-Level Claims Reserving
summary: Outstanding claim liabilities are revised repeatedly as claims develop, yet most modern reserving models are trained as one-shot predictors and typically learn only from settled claims. We formulate individual claims reserving as a claim-level Markov decision process in which an agent sequentially updates outstanding claim liability (OCL) estimates over development, using continuous actions and a reward design that balances accuracy with stable reserve revisions. A key advantage of this reinforcement learning (RL) approach is that it can learn from all observed claim trajectories, including claims that remain open at valuation, thereby avoiding the reduced sample size and selection effects inherent in supervised methods trained on ultimate outcomes only. We also introduce practical components needed for actuarial use -- initialisation of new claims, temporally consistent tuning via a rolling-settlement scheme, and an importance-weighting mechanism to mitigate portfolio-level underestimation driven by the rarity of large claims. On CAS and SPLICE synthetic general insurance datasets, the proposed Soft Actor-Critic implementation delivers competitive claim-level accuracy and strong aggregate OCL performance, particularly for the immature claim segments that drive most of the liability.
tldr: This paper introduces a reinforcement learning approach for individual claims reserving in the insurance industry, addressing limitations of traditional methods by learning from all claim trajectories and incorporating practical actuarial components.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于保险行业个人理赔准备金的强化学习方法，通过学习所有理赔轨迹并结合实际精算组件，解决了传统方法的局限性。
summary_zh: 未决赔款负债会随着赔案进展不断被修正，但大多数现代准备金模型都被训练成一次性预测器，并且通常只从已结案赔案中学习。我们将个体赔案准备金的估计建模为一个赔案层面的马尔可夫决策过程，其中智能体在理赔进展过程中连续更新未决赔款负债 (OCL) 的估计值，采用连续动作和奖励设计，以平衡准确性和储备金修订的稳定性。这种强化学习 (RL) 方法的一个关键优势是，它可以从所有观察到的赔案轨迹中学习，包括在估值时仍未结案的赔案，从而避免了仅接受最终结果监督训练的方法中固有的样本量减少和选择效应。我们还引入了精算应用所需的实用组件——新赔案的初始化，通过滚动结算方案进行时间一致性调整，以及一种权重机制，以减轻由大额赔案的稀有性驱动的投资组合层面低估问题。在 CAS 和 SPLICE 合成一般保险数据集上，所提出的 Soft Actor-Critic 实现提供了具有竞争力的赔案层面准确性和强大的总体 OCL 表现，尤其是在驱动大部分负债的不成熟赔案部分。

title: Predefined-time One-Shot Cooperative Estimation, Guidance, and Control for Simultaneous Target Interception
summary: This work develops a unified nonlinear estimation-guidance-control framework for cooperative simultaneous interception of a stationary target under a heterogeneous sensing topology, where sensing capabilities are non-uniform across interceptors. Specifically, only a subset of agents is instrumented with onboard seekers (informed/seeker-equipped agents), whereas the rest of them (seeker-less agents) acquire the information about the target indirectly via the informed agents and execute a distributed cooperative guidance for simultaneous target interception. To address the resulting partial observability, a predefined-time distributed observer is leveraged, guaranteeing convergence of the target state estimates for seeker-less agents through information exchange with seeker-equipped neighbors over a directed communication graph. Thereafter, an improved time-to-go estimate accounting for wide launch envelopes is utilized to design the distributed cooperative guidance commands. This estimate is coupled with a predefined-time consensus protocol, ensuring consensus in the agents' time-to-go values. The temporal upper bounds within which both observer error and time-to-go consensus error converge to zero can be prescribed as design parameters. Furthermore, the cooperative guidance commands are realized by means of an autopilot, wherein the interceptor is steered by canard actuation. The corresponding fin deflection commands are generated using a predefined-time convergent sliding mode control law. This enables the autopilot to precisely track the commanded lateral acceleration within a design-specified time, while maintaining non-singularity of the overall design. Theoretical guarantees are supported by numerical simulations across diverse engagement geometries, verifying the estimation accuracy, the cooperative interception performance, and the autopilot response using the proposed scheme.
tldr: This paper presents a predefined-time control framework for the cooperative interception of a stationary target by multiple agents with heterogeneous sensing capabilities, using estimation, guidance, and control laws with predefined convergence times. It focuses on scenarios where some agents have direct sensor access, while others rely on communication.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种预定义时间控制框架，用于多个具有异构感知能力的智能体协同拦截静止目标，通过预定义收敛时间的估计、制导和控制律实现。其重点在于部分智能体具有直接传感器访问，而其他智能体依赖通信的场景。
summary_zh: 本研究针对异构感知拓扑下的静止目标协同同步拦截问题，提出了一种统一的非线性估计-制导-控制框架，其中拦截器之间的感知能力并不均衡。具体而言，只有一部分智能体配备了机载导引头（知情/配备导引头的智能体），其余智能体（无导引头的智能体）通过知情智能体间接获取目标信息，并执行分布式协同制导以实现目标同步拦截。为解决由此产生的局部可观测性问题，采用一种预定义时间分布式观测器，通过在有向通信图上与配备导引头的邻居进行信息交换，保证了无导引头智能体的目标状态估计收敛。随后，利用考虑了宽广发射包线的改进剩余飞行时间估计，设计了分布式协同制导指令。该估计与预定义时间一致性协议相结合，确保了智能体剩余飞行时间值的一致性。观测器误差和剩余飞行时间一致性误差收敛到零的时间上限，可以预设为设计参数。此外，协同制导指令通过自动驾驶仪实现，其中拦截器通过鸭式布局进行控制。相应的舵面偏转指令通过预定义时间收敛滑模控制律生成。这使得自动驾驶仪能够在设计指定的时间内精确跟踪指令的横向加速度，同时保持整体设计的非奇异性。理论保证由跨不同交战几何结构的数值模拟支持，验证了所提出方案的估计精度、协同拦截性能和自动驾驶仪响应。

title: Optimizing the Design of a Simple Three-Sphere Magnetic Microswimmer
summary: When swimming at low Reynolds numbers, inertial effects are negligible and reciprocal movements cannot induce net motion. Instead, symmetry breaking is necessary to achieve net propulsion.
